evals.prompt: Plan version 1.0 for a notification system that integrates with Slack and email. That's all I have so far.
evals.expected_output: Agent asks up to 5 focused questions on actors, channels, triggers, multitenancy; does not generate requirements.md.

evals.prompt: I answered your clarification questions — here's my reply: admins configure webhooks, users only receive in-app alerts, single-tenant for now.
evals.expected_output: Agent summarizes confirmed scope, asks to proceed, compiles enriched context for requirements-generator.

evals.prompt: Add a dashboard to the app.
evals.expected_output: Agent identifies ambiguities (KPIs, roles, data sources) and asks clarifying questions before requirements.

evals.prompt: Refine this version scope from descritivo.md — Laravel+React repo with backend/ and frontend/ but no docs/context/brownfield-map.md.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs bootstrap-brownfield first, creates brownfield-map.md, does not grep application code for clarification; then asks scope questions.

evals.prompt: Clarify scope for version 2.3.0 — brownfield-map.md exists with Date 2025-11-01.
evals.expected_output: Agent stops at Step 0.4 gate, shows last map date 2025-11-01, asks refresh or keep, waits for human before scope questions.
